title: System Use Notification Banner Acceptance in SSH Sessions

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: Splunk Add-on for Unix and Linux (Splunkbase 833)
spl:
index=os sourcetype=linux:secure earliest=-7d process=sshd
| search "Accepted" OR "session opened"
| rex "(?i)banner=(?<banner_ack>yes|no)"
| stats count by banner_ack, dest
| where banner_ack="no" OR isnull(banner_ack)
value: Verifies SSH banner or interactive MOTD markers appear in session logs for AC-8 system use notification where technically feasible.
implementation: (1) Standardize sshd_config `Banner` path; (2) optionally emit structured JSON from bastion; (3) do not log full banner text if classified; (4) report exceptions monthly.
visualization: Table (hosts missing ack), Bar chart (by datacenter), Single value (percent compliant)

references.title: Splunk Add-on for Unix and Linux

knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
